docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $120.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, NAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DEVEN PILLAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NAN TANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE PROPER PARTY TO SUE. HE IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE VEHICLE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PILLAY, DEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, NAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
